welcome: Hey there! Welcome to SupplyMind AI — I'm your friendly copilot, ready to help you navigate the platform. I can tell you about our features like Inventory, Forecasting, Insights, Reports, and more. What would you like to know?
stockMindWelcome: Ask Stock Mind is ready. Ask about stock, demand, coverage, active products, or the latest snapshot.
placeholder: Ask about features, navigation, or how things work...
